title: Aero E-commerce
description: A full-featured modern e-commerce platform with secure payments, scalable routing, and a clean product architecture built with React and Node.js.

title: Home-Rights
description: AI-powered legal platform helping UK tenants understand their housing rights using a local LLM, ML document analysis, React, Python, MongoDB, and Azure.

title: Proj_Rentease
description: Flask RESTful API for property rental management with JWT authentication, role-based access control, and a TypeScript + MongoDB backend.

title: PeerView
description: Modern Q&A platform for students and teachers powered by Azure Cloud. Real-time interactions, cloud-deployed and production-ready.

title: Aries Ventures Web
description: Aries Ventures platform migration to a modular Angular 17 architecture with complex multi-step onboarding flows and a custom design system.

title: Iris Flower Classification
description: Machine learning classification model exploring the Iris dataset using Python data science libraries — scikit-learn, Pandas, and Matplotlib.
